title: Precision Urology Hospital | Urology, Nephrology & Kidney Transplant Center
heading: Welcome To Precision Urology Hospital
description: We are one of the Best Urology, Nephrology & Kidney Transplant hospitals in Lucknow with a complete range of Uro-Nephro services provided by the Best Urologists and Nephrologists in Lucknow
text:

Book an Appointment Quality Excellence Precision Urology Hospital is the only 100 bed single speciality hospital in Lucknow division to be accredited by NABH, Quality Council of India Book an Appointment Comprehensive Urology Services Precision Urology Hospital is the only single speciality hospital in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh dedicated to Urology with the minimally invasive armamentarium available Book an Appointment Kidney Transplant Hospital In India Precision Urology Hospital is a centre of excellence that works tirelessly to give a fresh lease of life to patients in need of a kidney transplant Book an Appointment The PUH Model Our highly trained team of doctors and attentive support staff strive to provide world class yet affordable care to every patient Book an Appointment Ayushman Bharat Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojna Book an Appointment Previous Next Precision Urology Hospital Launched Robotic Surgery at Affordable Rates Precision Urology Hospital is an NABH accredited and NBE certified urology training institute. Who we are Welcome To Precision Urology Hospital Precision Urology Hospital is a tribute to the dream once lived by its chief mentor, Late Sri Swami Dayal Mishra, whose unwavering faith continues to guide our way even today. Precision Urology Hospital started its operations in April 2016 as the only single specialty hospital in Lucknow division dedicated to Urology and Nephrology with the minimally invasive armamentarium available. Now a 100-bedded hospital, PUH has continuously added the latest innovative technologies for the benefit of its patients. The vast experience of the doctors at PUH includes Robotics, Advanced Laparoscopy, Minimally invasive Endourology, Renal Transplantation and treatment of other urological diseases related to Uro-Oncology, Pediatric Urology, Andrology, Female Urology, Reconstructive Urology, among others. In 2020, PUH became a dedicated Kidney Transplant centre. We work on the motto that ‘Every life deserves world-class care at affordable prices.’ Our Vision Our vision is to be the region's first choice for patients, physicians, academicians, and employees by demonstrating best practices in urological & nephrological clinical care and medical research. Our Mission We are committed to providing world-class, affordable, and comprehensive urological and nephrological care. We follow ethical clinical standards with a focussed single-specialty approach to urology and nephrology with all sub-disciplines under one roof. We believe in delivering extraordinary results with exceptional doctors using new and innovative solutions to urology and nephrology problems. Patients’ satisfaction is our top most priority and in order to achieve that, we have broadly sub categorized urology/nephrology into sub specialty areas that are managed by experts in the field. Urology Services Nephrology Services Anaesthesiology Services Advanced Diagnostic Services Robotic-Surgery Urology Services The Urology Department at Precision Urology Hospital manages the surgical treatment and care of patients with a wide range of urological ailments. Our high-volume subspecialty clinics are well-equipped to handle the entire spectrum of simple as well as challenging clinical cases for the treatment of bladder, prostate and kidney disorders. The team’s knowledge and vast experience is supported by state-of-the-art technology and “Patients First philosophy”, providing compassionate and responsive care to our patients.

We have a dedicated Endourology clinic that deals with the latest minimally invasive modalities for treatment of stones in Genito-urinary tract, prostate enlargement and obstruction in the urinary pipe. Nephrology Services Nephrology is a subspeciality of internal medicine which deals with diseases of kidney and urinary tract. The main function of the kidney includes filtration of blood and removing waste products generated by the body that are excreted via urine. Other functions include regulation of electrolytes, fluid status, and blood pressure control. Kidney produces two important hormones, Erythropoietin and Vitamin D. Erythropoietin is essential for normal production of hemoglobin; Vitamin D maintains bone health. Anaesthesiology Services At Precision Urology Hospital, we are committed to keep our patients pain-free and comfortable during medical procedures. Our anesthesia team, headed by Dr. Vandana Mishra, helps us diligently in that cause since anesthesia temporarily blocks sensory/pain signals from nerves to the centres in the brain. The Critical Care Department has full time anesthetists who handle high dependency patients in medical and surgical ICU. Advanced Diagnostic Services Urologists now have many tools to help diagnose disease in our kidney, ureter, bladder and urethra. Precision Urology Hospital has separate Radiology and Pathology departments that aid the treating consultant to come to a precise diagnosis. Patients coming to the Outpatient department are directed to the Diagnostic suite after initial counselling. Once the diagnostic tests and imaging are carried out, the treating consultant reviews the results and then the final diagnosis is made. All the tests and imaging required to come to a specific diagnosis are made in a single OPD day visit to reduce the visit-to-diagnosis time. Generally, these diagnostic tests and imaging are detailed, often pain-free, and quick. Centre for Robotic Surgery in Urology Speciality: Robotic surgery, a recent addition to the existing laparoscopic surgeries, enhances the effectiveness of the operating surgeon. Robotic surgery with the da Vinci Surgical System was approved by the Food and Drug Administration in 2000. The technique has been rapidly adopted by hospitals in the United States and Europe. Its penetration in India is speedily increasing with many centres now having their own robot.

Dr. Shashikant Mishra and his team are trained Robotic surgeons. In the past, Dr. Mishra has performed complex robotic procedures such as radical cystectomy and prostatectomy with ease. We do realize that the high cost of robotic procedures may render them untenable for some. However, with the greater flexibility and control that they provide, the surgeon is able to perform complex procedures with more precision. Thus, it is our endeavour to bring forward a robotic platform soon to cater to the needs of our patients. Kidney Transplant Center Precision Urology is the best hospital for kidney transplants in Lucknow , offering unmatched expertise, cutting-edge technology, and exceptional patient care. A plethora of kidney transplants with minimum waiting time are performed at the hospital- ABO blood group compatible kidney transplant, ABO incompatible kidney transplant (patients whose blood group does not match that of their donor), and re-transplants of patients who have had complications in their earlier transplant. A 24-hour dialysis facility is available in the hospital and dialysis is conducted by skilled and trained dialysis technicians under the supervision of experienced nephrologists. Additionally, PUH is equipped to handle cases of pre-emptive transplants for patients who have suddenly been diagnosed with failure of both kidneys. The hospital's state-of-the-art facilities and advanced medical equipment contribute to the high success rate of kidney transplants. The meticulous pre-operative evaluations, thorough donor screening, and comprehensive post-operative care offered by the hospital's dedicated team ensure optimal outcomes for patients. Commitment to Excellence Patients who choose Precision Urology can be confident that they are receiving treatment from the best Urologists & Nephrologists in the field. The hospital's team of specialists comprises experienced urologists, nephrologists, surgeons, and support staff who work collaboratively to provide comprehensive and personalized care. Their expertise, combined with their dedication to ongoing professional development, ensures that patients receive the highest level of medical attention and the most effective treatment strategies. Beyond the medical expertise and state-of-the-art facilities, Precision Urology understands the emotional impact that genitourinary ailments & cancers can have on individuals and their families. The hospital offers counseling and support services to address the psychological and emotional well-being of patients throughout their treatment journey. This holistic approach fosters a compassionate and nurturing environment where patients can feel heard, supported, and empowered. Patient Speak See What Patients Say About PUH This is a very caring and specialized hospital. Nursing staff is so cooperative and caring that one will get a feel like home. Insurance desk is also very professional and attentive. Above all, the doctors provide the best diagnosis. I chose this hospital for surgery after tedious comparison. When all the other doctors were confused in my case, this hospital provided me precise diagnosis. I must say, Precision Urology is the best urology hospital. ATUL BAJPAI I feel blessed to be admitted at Precision Urology Hospital. All the doctors are very experienced, caring, polite, cool-minded, and supportive. The staff supervise professionally as well as personally. Nursing staff and Transplant coordinators (Abhishek & Prateek) are also very professional and attentive. The Dialysis center is clean, and all the staff members are very helpful. Dr. Shashikant Mishra, Dr. Avneet Gupta, Dr. Aditya PS Sengar, Dr. Gyvi Gaurav, Dr. Shashank Agrawal, and Dr. Venkatesh took care of all the major and minute details of the kidney transplant surgery. They are among the best doctors of Urology in Asia. God bless Dr. Shashikant Mishra, Dr. Gyvi Gaurav & team Precision. Thanks to all Precision doctors, for giving me a new life. SAURAV It was a very positive experience since the first visit to Precision Urology Hospital in Oct 2020 for my brother, Mr. Kuldeep Kumar Singh- kidney transplant patient. From the moment we entered the doors to the reception, we felt welcomed, cared for and completely at ease. It is an extremely well-maintained hospital with a terrific team of doctors- Dr. Shashikant Mishra, Dr. Avneet Gupta, Dr. Aditya P.S. Sengar, Dr. Gyvi Gaurav and Dr. Venkatesh T. who stood by us during the journey to recovery. The team of doctors is extremely knowledgeable and personable. We were never made to wait and if ever we needed to contact them or the staff, they were super speedy in responding to our inquiries. We appreciate the entire team of doctors, nurses, and staff and thank you all a lot. Truly, we would recommend this hospital to anyone seeking answers to better their health and do so in a very personalized way. We wish the team a grand success, bright future, and god speed. Thank you all! AKASH SINGH Precision Urology is one of the best hospitals in Lucknow with the best doctors who have very friendly and kind behaviour. Last year, my grandmother had a surgery here. Now it's been more than a year she is doing very well. I would surely recommend this hospital to everyone. SUCHI SONI I have been fortunate to have my father operated at Precision Urology Hospital under the endless effort from the beautiful team of Doctors, guided by Dr. Shashikant Mishra. My father was suffering from Prostrate problem along with Phimosis and Kidney Stone issue. Dr. Mishra is one of the best doctors in the country. He is doing great social work, as the same operation I tried to do in one of the reputed hospitals of Delhi, where I would have been charged triple the amount than PUH. I stay in Greater Noida, but I preferred to take my ill father from the said place to Lucknow as my complete trust was on Dr. Shashikant sir and the hospital as the same type of operation for my father-in-law was done by Sir 5 years back. The hospital staff were also very supportive and gave us utmost care. So, I highly recommend PUH as you can blindly trust Shashikant Sir, his team, and the Hospital. BINAYAK PARASHAR I am from nepal. My father-in-law has prostate issue. First of all, we met the team of doctors- Dr. Shashank, Dr. Misra and Dr.Gaurav. They informed us very clearly about the issue and then did the surgery. The helpfulness and humility of the entire staff is amazing. Specially, the administration and management of this hospital is excellent. PADAM KUNWAR Dr. Shashank agrawal is incredible. Not only has he taken great care of my health, but also he is so humble to speak with at every point when i took his consultation. It’s rare to find a doctor that combines such personal touches and care for a patient as a person with outstanding quality of medical care. I highly recommend to seek opinion from him if you are suffering from urinary related problem.
Apart from doctor the supporting hospital staff makes the stay very comfortable. Precision urology hospital should be first and only choice for urinary related issues Adnaan Khan Dr. Payal gaggar is a great Nephrologist! She is very understanding and listens to your concerns with full patience. I have taken opinion from several doctors before approaching her but nobody came to a diagnosis. She took detailed history and after looking my previous reports she made a diagnosis and started medications accordingly. In few days my problems started getting resolved and at present i am completely allright. I highly recommend Dr. Payal gaggar to anyone looking for a nephrologist for kidney related problems.
